title: Benefits Coordinator
description: Capital One is hiring a Benefits Coordinator to manage employee benefits programs, process benefits enrollments, and provide benefits education to our Research Triangle Park workforce. You will be the primary point of contact for employees with benefits questions, manage vendor relationships, and ensure compliance with benefits regulations.
responsibilities: Coordinate annual open enrollment and manage enrollment administration
Process benefits applications and maintain accurate benefits records
Answer employee questions about health insurance, retirement, and other benefits
Prepare benefits communications and education materials
Reconcile benefits invoices and process payments to carriers
Ensure compliance with benefits regulations and audit requirements

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Human Resources, Business, or related field
certifications: None required; PHR or SHRM-CP preferred

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
Capital One retirement savings plan with match
